KLING AI Black Friday Mega Sale
Don’t miss out on our biggest sale of the year!  
 Event Period: Nov 15 - Dec 3, Los Angeles time
 50% OFF your first year on a yearly subscription
 50% Extra Credits on any credit purchase
 First-time users: Unlock 3 extra

Black Friday Sale November 28th 11AM EST

50% Off Everything.

In 2021 I had 2 loans on my house. I was $500k in debt. I told my wife we’d be ok...

Today, the company I co-founded (Triple Whale) is used by 50k brands. And now, we’re making our biggest update yet:

Introducing the Black Friday AI Workspace.

It's like ChatGPT + Zapier BUT
美国双十一已经被AI占领！人肉比价、凑单时代结束！国内电商什么时候跟上？#人工智能

Don’t accidentally waste ad budget on Black Friday.

If you scale your ad spend, you might tank your ROAS.

We built an AI agent to change that for your Google Ads:
unless I see “was $5600, now $16.75" i’m not interested in no black Friday sale

Got an Idea on Wednesday

Refined it, bought a domain, and made a sales page and ads with AI by Thursday

Ad campaign went Live 4am Friday

Few hrs later, First Sale

Idea validated

Now we build the product and scale this thing

Rinse and Repeat

The sale everyone waited for, just launched.

Suno AI’s Black Friday special is here.

Transform ideas into music instantly at the best yearly price.
